baseline_guidance: Run each eval with this skill and compare against a no-skill baseline or the previous skill version; pass only when the skilled run better satisfies the assertions without losing required safety or precision.

evals.prompt: Add Playwright tests for a Clerk-protected dashboard and sign-in flow.
evals.expected_output: Uses Clerk testing utilities and CLERK_TESTING_TOKEN, isolates session state, protects the dashboard assertion, and keeps tests deterministic.
assertions: Initializes Clerk's test environment before auth-dependent tests.
Uses storage state or login helpers intentionally rather than relying on shared browser state.
Covers both unauthenticated redirect and authenticated dashboard access.
Documents any missing CLERK_TESTING_TOKEN as a blocked test prerequisite.
